stocks.impact_theory: Escalating US-Israel-Iran war disrupts Persian Gulf oil shipments, pushing Brent crude above $82/bbl amid supply fears. Economic boost for XOM's refining and production margins; market psychology shifts from panic to opportunistic buying in energy. Parallels 1990 Gulf War (oil +35%, XOM +20% in weeks). Analogies: profiting from a drought as a water supplier; riding a tidal wave in a surfboard factory.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Web searches confirm oil surge from Iran conflict; X posts highlight energy beneficiaries like ONGC/OIL but US majors similar. Sentiment positive with market recovery (S&P +0.8%), limit 20 latest posts show hype on crude.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for +8-12% gains in 1-2 weeks on sustained oil >$85
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid or short above $160 for -3-5% if de-escalation
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Quick peace talks (Iran outreach per NYT), OPEC+ surge, recession curbing demand

stocks.justification: Clear macro driver with historical precedent and real-time price action alignment.

stocks.impact_theory: Iran war escalations hit Hormuz Strait, elevating oil prices and CVX's upstream profits. Implications: inflation hedge play; psych: relief rally post-initial dip. Like 2019 drone attacks (oil +15%, CVX +10%). Analogies: selling umbrellas in a monsoon; harvesting bumper crop from fertilizer boom.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Similar to XOM, news on gas prices +30%, X semantic search on oil majors positive amid volatility.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long targeting +7-10% as oil holds gains

stocks.justification: Strong sector tailwinds confirmed across sources.

stocks.impact_theory: Prolonged Iran conflict ramps defense spending, F-35/missile demand for LMT. Econ: fiscal stimulus via contracts; psych: safe-haven bid. Parallels Ukraine war (defense +25% YTD 2022). Analogies: armor sales during battle; locksmith booming in crime wave.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X keyword searches flag defense plays; web on war extension boosts sentiment.

stocks.justification: Solid but depends on war duration.

stocks.impact_theory: RTX Patriot/missiles critical vs Iran drones/missiles. Implications: backlog growth; psych: geopolitical premium. Like Gulf War II (RTX +18%). Analogies: bulletproof vests in shootout; firewalls during cyber surge.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: News on strikes, X on defense stocks amid Iran.

stocks.justification: High conviction but secondary to LMT.

stocks.impact_theory: Jet fuel costs soar 30%+ from Iran oil spike, eroding DAL margins. Econ: higher fares/lower demand; psych: risk-off travel. Parallels 2022 Ukraine (airlines -20%). Analogies: gas-guzzler in oil crisis; beach vendor in hurricane.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Web on gas prices jump hurting transport; X sentiment negative on high energy costs.

stocks.justification: Direct cost exposure with historical downside.
